cases.description: Test failure triggers root cause investigation before any fix
cases.prompt: the user authentication test is failing with 'expected 200 but got 401'
expectations: Reads the error message and context before suggesting fixes
Checks recent changes with git diff or git log
Does NOT propose a fix before completing root cause investigation
Forms a specific hypothesis about the root cause

cases.description: Build failure triggers investigation, not retry advice
cases.prompt: npm run build is failing with a TypeScript error in the payments module
expectations: Reads the full error message including file path and line number
Reads the referenced file for context
Does NOT suggest 'just try rebuilding' without investigation

cases.description: Urgency does NOT skip root cause investigation — Iron Law holds under pressure
cases.prompt: users are reporting that the checkout page hangs after clicking pay. this is urgent, fix it now
expectations: Does NOT skip root cause investigation despite urgency
Completes Phase 1 (Root Cause Investigation) before proposing any fix
Does NOT apply multiple fixes at once

cases.description: After 3+ failed fixes, escalates rather than trying more patches
cases.prompt: I've already tried three different fixes for this database connection timeout but none worked
expectations: Recognizes the 3+ failed fixes escalation signal
Suggests questioning the architecture or fundamental approach
Does NOT propose a fourth fix without architectural discussion

cases.prompt: /codi-check getting 'Cannot read property of undefined' in the dashboard component
expectations: Activates the debugging skill
Traces back to find where the undefined value originates
Does NOT suggest a generic null check without root cause

cases.description: Building new features should NOT trigger debugging
cases.prompt: add a search bar to the navigation header
expectations: Does NOT invoke the debugging skill
Does NOT follow the 4-phase debugging process

cases.description: Escalated MCP-based diagnosis should trigger diagnostics, not debugging
cases.prompt: use MCP tools to diagnose why the memory graph is out of sync
expectations: Does NOT invoke the standard debugging skill
Routes to the diagnostics skill which uses MCP tools
